description: Skill activation triggers for knowpatch development

type-lint-guard.description: Block skill file edits when tsc/bun test has not been run after code changes
type-lint-guard.blockMessage:
BLOCKED: Run tsc --noEmit && bun test first.
You must pass typecheck + tests before editing skill files.

Override: SKIP_TYPE_LINT_GUARD=1

correction-authoring.description: Suggest skill-authoring conventions when writing/editing corrections

skill-authoring-guard.description: Remind to review skill-authoring conventions before editing skills/knowpatch/ files
skill-authoring-guard.blockMessage:
BLOCKED: Review skill-authoring conventions first.
You must check authoring principles before editing skill/correction files.

→ .agents/conventions/skill-authoring.md
→ Override: SKIP_SKILL_AUTHORING_GUARD=1

enforcement_types.suggest: Advisory — injects skill suggestion into Claude context (prompt-time only)
enforcement_types.remind: Session-scoped block — blocks file edits until skill is invoked once per session (exit 2)
enforcement_types.block: Hard block — prevents tool execution until pass state recorded (exit 2)
